# ============================================================================
# GLAD Vulkan Loader
# ============================================================================
# Vulkan function loader generated by GLAD.
# Uses system Vulkan SDK (MoltenVK on macOS, native on Windows/Linux).
# ============================================================================

set(GLAD_VULKAN_SOURCES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/GLAD/vulkan.cpp
)

set(GLAD_VULKAN_HEADERS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/GLAD/vulkan.h
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/GLAD/vk_platform.h
)

snap_rhi_add_library(glad-vulkan STATIC ${GLAD_VULKAN_SOURCES} ${GLAD_VULKAN_HEADERS})

snap_rhi_target_include_directories(glad-vulkan .)

# Link to glad-platform for common utilities
snap_rhi_target_link_libraries(glad-vulkan glad::glad-platform)

# Platform-specific definitions
if(ANDROID)
    target_compile_definitions(glad-vulkan PUBLIC VK_USE_PLATFORM_ANDROID_KHR=1)
endif()

if(APPLE)
    target_compile_definitions(glad-vulkan PUBLIC VK_ENABLE_BETA_EXTENSIONS=1)
    target_compile_definitions(glad-vulkan PUBLIC VK_USE_PLATFORM_METAL_EXT=1)
endif()

# ============================================================================
# Platform-specific Vulkan library linking
# ============================================================================
# Search for locally-installed Vulkan SDK libraries.
# ============================================================================

if(IOS)
    # ========================================================================
    # iOS Vulkan (Vulkan SDK)
    # ========================================================================
    # Two modes:
    #   A) Framework mode (SNAP_RHI_VULKAN_ENABLE_LAYERS=ON) —
    #      dlopen vulkan.framework, which dispatches through the Vulkan Loader.
    #   B) Static mode (default) — link libMoltenVK.a directly,
    #      GLAD resolves symbols via RTLD_DEFAULT.
    #
    # The compile definition SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_USE_FRAMEWORKS controls
    # which runtime dlopen path GLAD uses (A → 1, B → 0).

    if(SNAP_RHI_VULKAN_ENABLE_LAYERS)
        # ---- Mode A: Framework mode (with Vulkan Loader + validation layers) ----
        message(STATUS "[GLAD] iOS Vulkan: Framework mode (validation layers enabled)")
        target_compile_definitions(glad-vulkan PUBLIC SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_USE_FRAMEWORKS=1)

        # Find the Vulkan SDK iOS directory
        set(_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_PATHS
            "$ENV{VULKAN_SDK}/../iOS"
            "$ENV{HOME}/VulkanSDK"
        )

        # Search for vulkan.framework
        set(_VULKAN_FRAMEWORK "")
        foreach(_sdk_path IN LISTS _VULKAN_SDK_IOS_PATHS)
            # Handle VULKAN_SDK relative path
            set(_candidate "${_sdk_path}/lib/vulkan.framework")
            if(EXISTS "${_candidate}")
                set(_VULKAN_FRAMEWORK "${_candidate}")
                set(_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_LIB "${_sdk_path}/lib")
                set(_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_SHARE "${_sdk_path}/share")
                break()
            endif()
            # Search versioned directories (~/VulkanSDK/<version>/iOS)
            file(GLOB _versioned_dirs "${_sdk_path}/*/iOS/lib/vulkan.framework")
            if(_versioned_dirs)
                list(GET _versioned_dirs 0 _candidate)
                get_filename_component(_lib_dir "${_candidate}" DIRECTORY)
                get_filename_component(_ios_dir "${_lib_dir}" DIRECTORY)
                set(_VULKAN_FRAMEWORK "${_candidate}")
                set(_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_LIB "${_lib_dir}")
                set(_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_SHARE "${_ios_dir}/share")
                break()
            endif()
        endforeach()

        if(NOT _VULKAN_FRAMEWORK)
            message(FATAL_ERROR
                "[GLAD] vulkan.framework not found for iOS Vulkan with layers.\n"
                "Install the Vulkan SDK (https://vulkan.lunarg.com/sdk/home) and ensure the iOS\n"
                "component is installed. Set VULKAN_SDK to the SDK's macOS directory.\n"
                "Expected: <VULKAN_SDK>/../iOS/lib/vulkan.framework"
            )
        endif()

        message(STATUS "[GLAD] Found iOS Vulkan SDK: ${_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_LIB}")

        # Link the Vulkan Loader framework
        snap_rhi_target_link_libraries(glad-vulkan "${_VULKAN_FRAMEWORK}")

        # Determine MoltenVK.framework path from xcframework
        if(CMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT MATCHES "[Ss]imulator")
            set(_MOLTENVK_SLICE "ios-arm64_x86_64-simulator")
        else()
            set(_MOLTENVK_SLICE "ios-arm64")
        endif()
        set(_MOLTENVK_FRAMEWORK "${_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_LIB}/MoltenVK.xcframework/${_MOLTENVK_SLICE}/MoltenVK.framework")

        if(NOT EXISTS "${_MOLTENVK_FRAMEWORK}")
            message(FATAL_ERROR "[GLAD] MoltenVK.framework not found at: ${_MOLTENVK_FRAMEWORK}")
        endif()

        # Export framework paths for the demo app to embed them
        set(SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_FRAMEWORK "${_VULKAN_FRAMEWORK}" CACHE INTERNAL "")
        set(SNAP_RHI_IOS_MOLTENVK_FRAMEWORK "${_MOLTENVK_FRAMEWORK}" CACHE INTERNAL "")
        set(SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_SDK_LIB "${_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_LIB}" CACHE INTERNAL "")
        set(SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_SDK_SHARE "${_VULKAN_SDK_IOS_SHARE}" CACHE INTERNAL "")
        set(SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_USE_FRAMEWORKS ON CACHE INTERNAL "")

    else()
        # ---- Mode B: Static mode (MoltenVK linked directly, no layers) ----
        message(STATUS "[GLAD] iOS Vulkan: Static mode (no validation layers)")
        target_compile_definitions(glad-vulkan PUBLIC SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_USE_FRAMEWORKS=0)
        set(SNAP_RHI_IOS_VULKAN_USE_FRAMEWORKS OFF CACHE INTERNAL "")

        # Search for MoltenVK.xcframework with static library
        set(_MOLTENVK_SEARCH_PATHS
            "/usr/local/lib/MoltenVK.xcframework"
            "$ENV{VULKAN_SDK}/lib/MoltenVK.xcframework"
            "$ENV{VULKAN_SDK}/../MoltenVK/MoltenVK.xcframework"
            "$ENV{VULKAN_SDK}/../../MoltenVK/MoltenVK.xcframework"
        )

        if(CMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT MATCHES "[Ss]imulator")
            set(_MOLTENVK_SLICE "ios-arm64_x86_64-simulator")
        else()
            set(_MOLTENVK_SLICE "ios-arm64")
        endif()

        set(MOLTENVK_LIBRARY "")
        foreach(_search_path IN LISTS _MOLTENVK_SEARCH_PATHS)
            set(_candidate "${_search_path}/${_MOLTENVK_SLICE}/libMoltenVK.a")
            if(EXISTS "${_candidate}")
                set(MOLTENVK_LIBRARY "${_candidate}")
                break()
            endif()
        endforeach()

        if(MOLTENVK_LIBRARY)
            snap_rhi_target_link_libraries(glad-vulkan "${MOLTENVK_LIBRARY}")
            message(STATUS "[GLAD] Found MoltenVK for iOS: ${MOLTENVK_LIBRARY}")
        else()
            message(FATAL_ERROR
                "[GLAD] MoltenVK not found for iOS Vulkan build.\n"
                "Install the Vulkan SDK (https://vulkan.lunarg.com/sdk/home) or set VULKAN_SDK.\n"
                "Expected MoltenVK.xcframework at /usr/local/lib/ or relative to VULKAN_SDK.\n"
                "Searched for slice: ${_MOLTENVK_SLICE}"
            )
        endif()

        # MoltenVK depends on these Apple frameworks
        snap_rhi_target_link_libraries(glad-vulkan
            "-framework Metal"
            "-framework IOSurface"
            "-framework QuartzCore"
            "-framework Foundation"
        )
    endif()

elseif(UNIX AND NOT APPLE AND NOT ANDROID)
    # Linux: link libdl so GLAD can dlopen the Vulkan loader at runtime.
    snap_rhi_target_link_libraries(glad-vulkan ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS})
endif()

# Add glad:: alias for consistent target naming
if(NOT TARGET glad::glad-vulkan)
    add_library(glad::glad-vulkan ALIAS glad-vulkan)
endif()

# Export target for packaging
snap_rhi_export(glad-vulkan)
